name: agentvillage
description: Edge Esmeralda 2026 — popup knowledge, EdgeOS calendar & directory, Geo knowledge graph access, Index Network discovery, and one+1 Village Pulse + Edge Companion.

indexApiKey.title: Index Network API Key
indexApiKey.description: API key for Index Network. Obtain one at https://agent-ee26.edgecity.live/ or from your community admin.

edgeosToken.title: EdgeOS Bearer Token
edgeosToken.description: Human session JWT for Geo knowledge graph access, content writes, EdgeOS directory, and own profile.

edgeosApiKey.title: EdgeOS API Key
edgeosApiKey.description: Long-lived eos_live_... key for EdgeOS events and RSVPs.

villageApiBaseUrl.title: one+1 Village API Base URL
villageApiBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the one+1 Village API used by the village-pulse skill (e.g. https://aebfymivz2.us-east-1.awsapprunner.com). Provided by the community admin / agent dashboard.

villageHumanId.title: Village Resident ID
villageHumanId.description: Identifier used to attribute this resident's Village Pulse answers and predictions. Defaults to the resident's name if unset; the dashboard should pre-fill this per agent.

villageKey.title: Village API Key (optional)
villageKey.description: Optional shared key sent as the X-Village-Key header, if the one+1 Village deployment requires it.
